Data Processing & Retention Workflow Notice — Hanseong Innovations Co., Ltd. (KR issuer; investor‑relations and employment context)
Registered office: 124 Haneul‑ro, Seoryu‑gu, Daecheon‑si, Namcheon‑do 00000, Republic of Korea; 사업자등록번호 482-92-71354
Controller contact: Ms. Ji‑won Ahn (DPO), dpo@hanseong-innovations.co.kr, +82‑010‑7 7 77‑13 57; role‑only escalation: IR Manager
Scope: processing of employee records, resident‑number fields for payroll, deal room logs, and investor Q&A for Korea Equity eXchange (KEX) listing readiness
Identifiers collected: name, company email, mobile no., bank account (Darae Bank 912‑08‑123456), KR passport (M12 34567 8), and, if strictly needed, rrn: 83 01 01‑1 23 4 567 (masked on ingestion)
Example DSAR subject (fictional): Mr. Min‑su Cho, ms.cho@hanseong-innovations.co.kr; ac c t: ACCT‑8821**934; address on file: 7F, Solaris Bldg., 9‑7 Yeonhwa‑gil, Seoryu‑gu, Daecheon‑si 00000
Negative precision aid: we do not store device MAC addresses, do not collect IMEI, and generic labels like 고객명: ____ and 계좌번호: ____ in blank forms are not personal data until completed
MNPI controls: material non‑public information under the Financial Services and Capital Markets Act is quarantined; IR responses avoid undisclosed deal terms; trading blackout applies to staff and vendors
Transfers: limited overseas transfer to Bluetide Data Pte. Ltd. (processor) for archiving with consent notice per PIPA Art. 28‑7; contact for opt‑out via https://privacy.hanseong-innovations.co.kr/dsar?ticket=H I‑2026‑04‑003
Public bait not for PII routing: consumer finance helpline 1332 and city info 120 are public hotlines; do not submit DSARs to those numbers
Retention: IR inquiries 3 years; HR payroll 5 years from termination; deal‑room artifacts 7 years or until KEX approval becomes public, whichever is later
Adversarial checksum sample (not in use): 사업자등록번호 123‑45‑67891 (checksum mismatch), corp reg no. 000000‑0000000; do not populate with real data
Security: resident‑number fields stored using format‑preserving encryption; any OCR‑corrupted inputs like 83 0 101‑1 2 3 4 567 are normalized on receipt
Access & correction: submit DSARs to privacy@hanseong-innovations.co.kr or via https://ir.hanseong-innovations.co.kr/optout?rrn=83%200101-1%2023%204%20567&acct=ACCT%2D8821**934; response within 10 business days
Note: employment offers, product brochures, and press releases compiled from public sources do not contain MNPI and are outside blackout scope
